title: Aaniye Pudunga Venandaa Lyrics Wagah
stanzas:
aaniye aaniye aaniye
aaniye pudunga venandaa
oru aaniyum pudungavenandaa

sandayila kiliyatha satta illa
sandhanatha thadavatha motta illa
paruchayil vangatha mutta illa
pathu mani aanalum matta illa

aaniye pudunga venandaa
oru aaniyum pudungavenandaa
sandayila kiliyatha satta illa

sandhanatha thadavatha motta illa
paruchayil vangatha mutta illa
pathu mani aanalum matta illa

kanavella kaathu kedakku
manasellam poothu kedakku
uravella uri kedakku
usura kudukkum ooru

ungala pola nanga pongavilla
engala minja yaarum illa
sakkarakkattinu perum illa
unmayila nanga thana nalla pulla

vasayella edhukku irukku
palasellam mari kedakku
thimurellam meeri kedakku
thotta therikkum paaru

kaasu panamella thedavilla
paasam irundhale pothavilla
vesam pottu naanga vaazha villa
rosam patta thanae theva illa

aaniye pudunga venandaa
oru aaniyum pudungavenandaa
sandayila kiliyatha satta illa

sandhanatha thadavatha motta illa
paruchayil vangatha mutta illa
pathu mani aanalum matta illa

aaniye aaniye aaniye
aaniye pudunga venandaa
oru aaniyum pudungavenandaa

enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Aaniye Pudunga Venandaa from the movie Wagah. With Shenbagaraj's dynamic vocals and D Imman's captivating music, this song is a celebration of rhythm and spirit. Dive into this musical masterpiece that perfectly encapsulates the essence of Tamil folk music.
stanzaMeanings: Oh dear, don't remove the nail, not even a single nail.
In the fight, there is no torn shirt, no bald head from sandalwood, no egg taken from the market, even at ten o'clock, there is no mat.
Oh dear, don't remove the nail, not even a single nail. In the fight, there is no torn shirt.
No bald head from sandalwood, no egg taken from the market, even at ten o'clock, there is no mat.
Oh dear, don't remove the nail, not even a single nail.
Dreams are scattered, the heart is blooming, relationships are tied, the town gives life.
We don't rise like you, no one surpasses us, no name for sugar candy, truly we are good children.
Oh dear, don't remove the nail, not even a single nail.
Why are there locks? All fruits are ripe, all arrogance is surpassed, touch and see the spark.
We don't search for money, love is enough, we don't live in disguise, anger is unnecessary.
Oh dear, don't remove the nail, not even a single nail. In the fight, there is no torn shirt.
No bald head from sandalwood, no egg taken from the market, even at ten o'clock, there is no mat.
Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, oh dear, don't remove the nail, not even a single nail.
